validation.name: feature_ref_integrity
validation.description: Every level feature ref must match a feature id

validation.name: feature_used_in_levels
validation.description: Every feature must be referenced in at least one level

validation.name: description_required
validation.description: Every feature must include description.summary and description.fullText

validation.name: progression_required
validation.description: Every feature must include a progression object

validation.name: progression_level_alignment
validation.description: Feature progression levels must exist within class level range (1–maxLevel)

validation.name: level_has_valid_structure
validation.description: Each level must include level number, features array, and casting array

validation.name: casting_array_required
validation.description: Each level must include casting array (even if empty)

validation.name: feature_minimum
validation.description: Each class should have at least one feature

validation.name: level_coverage
validation.description: Class should define levels 1 through maxLevel

validation.name: level_feature_presence
validation.description: Each class should have at least one level with features

validation.name: progression_usage_check
validation.description: Features with progression should appear in corresponding levels within maxLevel

validation.name: casting_progression_sanity
validation.description: Casting classes should have casting progression across multiple levels

validation.name: confidence_required
validation.description: Each feature should include confidence rating

classMaxLevel: do not infer from levels[] or progression
validator must treat maxLevel as authoritative
missing_level_detection: warn if any level between 1 and maxLevel is missing
do not warn for levels above maxLevel
progression_bounds: all feature progression keys must be <= maxLevel
